payload.title: Event/field plumbing for rank
payload.description: Add 'rank' to TICKET_FIELDS (src/enums.js). Validate as a finite number in validateFieldValue (src/event-schema.js). Add column<->field mapping if needed (src/enums.js COLUMN_TO_FIELD) and ensure replay/set_field applies it (src/repo.js updateTicket allowed list, src/replay.js, src/pg/replay.js). No new event kind — reuse ticket.set_field.
